name: Carrot & Fennel Salad with Nuts & Seeds
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup skinned hazelnuts, coarsely chopped or blanched almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Drizzle the oil into a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chopped nuts and sunflower seeds. Stir until lightly toasted, then set aside.
3. Trim the fennel bulb, removing the leaves with a large, sharp knife. Cut the bulb into thin shreds (about 2 cups).
4. In a large bowl, combine the fennel, carrots, apple, and green onions.
5. For the dressing, whisk together the vinegar, oil, sugar, and salt until the sugar is dissolved. Pour over the vegetables and toss. The salad may be covered and refrigerated for up to 8 hours.
6. Just before serving, reserve 2 tbsp (25 mL) of the toasted nuts and seeds. Stir the remainder into the salad. Sprinkle the reserved nuts and seeds on top.
7. Garnish with apple slices (dipped in lemon juice), green onion curls, or fennel leaves.
